changelogs: Added a toggle for Server Map Backgrounds
Added replacing the join button with a spectate button for full servers
Added Command Abbreviations to the global chat
Added clan gradients to my clan/clan lookup
Made the menu values manually editable by text
Moved some stuff around in the Menu
Fixed Clan lookup not working for clans with special characters
Fixed Fanny and other skins not being affected by the Custom Skin Link
Fixed the inspect button not working in chat/disabling other hotkeys
third times the charm, initialization fixed
second attempt at fixing the initialization (edit: not working)
attempt to fix the client not initiating for some users (edit: not working)
Custom Skin Link will now be baked into the client, you can remove your script
Added Maps from [KTiers](https://ktiers.com/maps) into the Browser
Added new CSS from [Daymian's CSS Website](https://css.daymian.xyz/)
Added clan lookup (and clickable champion clans)
Added sorting by scores/scores per month in the clan view
Removed Scripts tab from the Browser
Fixed nicknames not being displayed when the chat fills up
Fixed nicknames sometimes crashing the game (hopefully)
Fixed bots not having a team color in the killfeed
Added Browser Tab featuring [Kirka Community Hub](https://kirkacommunityhub.pages.dev/) assets
Added Player Lookup to Friends list
Added Stop Overlap (hides the team hp while info overlay is active)
Made the local gradient way more user-friendly
Added gradient presets that are totally not ai
Added Colored killfeed (easily customizable by css)
Added customizable chat height cuz why not
Fixed Accept trades on Click and added a highlight
Fixed a bug where gradients would not appear in ranked games
Fixed gallery not able to display .webp images
Source Code is now available on Github
Fixed the market issue where the wrong prices would be displayed
Fixed a small z-index bug involving the market buttons
Gradients and badges will now appear ingame in the escape menu
Added a Hokey list under the About tab
Added Headshot and Winrate percentage in profile
Fixed the auto Chest/Pack opener (thanks to cheeseburger's script)
Fixed user gradients display in lobby aswell as in profile
Added animated gradients for both clan and username
Reduced the starting time to almost none when no update is available
Fixed Auto Updater (from this update on)
Added a spectate button to the games in your friendlist
Made the menu draggable by using the titlebar
Migrated from local to online badge management
